query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.role, u.roles, s.id as salesperson_id 
FROM users u
JOIN salespersons s ON u.id = s.userId
WHERE u.role != 'sales' OR u.roles NOT LIKE '%sales%'
LIMIT 10;
